title: Lesson 1280: 夜具, 優, 優...

items.gloss: Excellent (grade); A; superiority; excellence; gentle; graceful; elegant; skillful

to support; to maintain; to provide for; to bring up; to raise; to rear; to feed; to adopt (a child); to cultivate (a habit, a quality, etc.); to develop; to build up; to foster; to recuperate (from injury, illness, etc.)
company; association; society; regional Chinese god of the earth (or a village built in its honour); counter for companies, shrines, etc.
